name: mithun-portfolio-chatbot
description: AI-powered portfolio chatbot for Mithun's static ECE portfolio

scripts.build: esbuild components/chat/ChatWidget.tsx --bundle --minify --outfile=components/chat/ChatWidget.js && esbuild data/portfolioKnowledge.ts --bundle --minify --format=esm --outfile=data/portfolioKnowledge.js && esbuild components/FeedbackSection.tsx --bundle --minify --format=esm --outfile=components/FeedbackSection_v2.js
